title: Real-corpus latency/recall measurement + tiered ADR (canonical-CI dispatch reframed to local)
land_status: IMPL COMPLETE on local `main` working tree; codex review pending; NOT committed/pushed at time of writing (campaign-wide hard constraint: no push without explicit HITL OK).

reframe_hitl_2026_06_01.problem: The literal mandate (seed real corpus through the real bge embedder at N=1M on canonical CI) is physically infeasible: ~166 h of serialized candle seed at the PR-9-measured 1.67 docs/s vs a 240-min workflow timeout. Real-embedder N=1M is also not obtainable locally (same seed wall). The synthetic N=1M seed did not even drain within 3 h on the default per-row projection path (super-linear seed cost; Err(Scheduler) = wait_for_idle timeout, NOT a wedge).
decisions: HITL Q1: heavy real/canonical measurement is a LOCAL-only once-per-release exercise; CI carries only a fast 'is the read path broken?' smoke.
HITL Q2: recall pinned to the EU-7 all-real anchor recall@10=0.937 (CI 0.913-0.957, N=7667); floor stays 0.90.
HITL Q3: skip the 10K pre-flight; PR-9 already retired the concurrent-embed safety question (mechanical serialization + N=2000 clean) and supplied the 1.67 docs/s throughput figure.

HITL (latency disposition): AC-013/AC-019 budget becomes TIERED by N (10k / 100k / 1M). Only the 10k tier is the BINDING release gate for the 0.x and 1.x lines; 100k and 1M are tracked targets for post-1.0 (pre-2.1) ANN-index work. Adjust goalposts; accept the current bit-quant improvement as acceptable.
HITL accepted N=7667 (real-corpus EU-7) as 'close enough' to the 10k tier; the report notes the O(N) scaling.

files_changed.src/rust/crates/fathomdb-engine/tests/pe: NEW always-on CI smoke `ac_013_vector_read_path_smoke` (fixture-independent exact-match-sentinel canary for the two-phase bit-KNN + f32 rerank read path; no AGENT_LONG/feature/corpus). Tiered budget: AC013_DEFAULT_N 50000->10000 (binding tier); new AC013_GATE_N=10000; AC-013 + AC-019 assert 80/300 only at n<=AC013_GATE_N, else report AC013_TIER_INFO / AC019_TIER_INFO. Env knobs AC013_VECTOR_DIM (default 768) + AC013_DRAIN_TIMEOUT_MS (default 1_800_000) for the local canonical exercise.
files_changed..github/workflows/perf-canonical.yml: Header SCOPE NOTE: real-embedder + N=1M real-corpus is local-only (infeasible on the runner); this workflow exercises only the synthetic fixture; per-push read-path guard is the perf_gates smoke in ci.yml.
files_changed.dev/adr/ADR-0.7.0-text-query-latency-gat: AC-013 + AC-019 sections filled with the HITL-locked TIERED budget (10k binding; 100k/1M tracked post-1.0) + measured numbers; Decision-block note records the PR-3 amendment (AC-012/AC-020 untouched).
files_changed.dev/plans/runs/0.7.2-PR-3-perf-data.md: NEW comprehensive empirical-data record (every measurement with full settings: N, dim, K=192, samples, seed_ms, env, host, log path, verdict; O(N) scaling; recall anchor; AC-019 contention analysis).
PR-3 row -> IMPL COMPLETE (codex pending), reframed; AC-019 idle-box + EU7_GT_EMBED_PROGRESS open items RESOLVED.
P2-CANONICAL -> CLOSED with the reframe + measured tier numbers.

common.read_path: two-phase bit-KNN (sign-bit Hamming candidates) + f32 rerank + canonical-body fetch + FTS5 MATCH + soft-fallback probe (4 SQL/search)
common.host: AMD Ryzen Threadripper PRO 5945WX 12c/24t, Linux 6.17 x86_64, rustc 1.95.0
common.note: Full table + raw logs in dev/plans/runs/0.7.2-PR-3-perf-data.md

100k_tracked.note: tracked post-1.0 target; O(N) scan exceeds 80ms p50

1m_tracked.fresh_local_measurement: not obtained — default per-row projection seed did not drain within 3 h (Err(Scheduler)); 0.7.0 obtained 1M only via the W4.1 pcache2 + page_size=8192 seed path

ac013_latency_tiers.scaling: ~O(N) (no ANN index on vec0): 384-d 15ms@10k -> 147ms@100k (9.8x for 10x N); ~1.5ms per 1000 docs + fixed per-query FTS/probe overhead

ac013b_recall.note: ANN/quant fidelity (GT = exact f32 top-10 over the SAME model), not IR relevance. Earlier 0.828 was a conservative-measurement artifact (see 0.7.2-PR-2c-recall-rootcause.md). N=1M real recall not measurable on this hardware.

real_path_contention_point.note: PR-2c re-measure under concurrent CPU load; contention, NOT a regression (same fixture/N as the 343ms clean run). Resolves the carried 'AC-019 idle-box re-run' item.

synthetic_report_only.decision: perf_gates AC-019 is REPORT-ONLY (no assertion); HITL 2026-06-01.
synthetic_report_only.reason: The synthetic isotropic fixture CANNOT meet max(baseline_p99*10,150ms) — a property of the synthetic DATA, not the box (clean-box loadavg ~2.6). Instant embed -> baseline 16-28ms -> bound 168-282ms, far tighter than production's 405ms; absolute 8-thread tail ~520ms@384d / ~1048ms@768d is the same order as the real path. K=64->192 (recall fix) raised the tail vs the old STATUS-PVQ 131ms (K=64).

ci_smoke.design: Seeds 512 rows (synthetic VaryingEmbedder) incl. an exact-match sentinel whose body embeds to the query vector -> Hamming-0 candidate + f32 rerank distance 0 -> guaranteed rank 1. Asserts vector_row_count==N and sentinel ranks first through the full two-phase path. No AGENT_LONG / default-embedder feature / corpus needed; runs in normal ci.yml on every runner.

tests.always_on_default_suite: 9 passed / 0 failed / 5 ignored (perf_gates, no AGENT_LONG) incl. new smoke + floor sentinel

binding_tier_AGENT_LONG_n10k.ac_013_vector_retrieval_latency: PASS (p50 23 / p99 28 ms at N=10k, dim 768 default)
binding_tier_AGENT_LONG_n10k.ac_019_mixed_retrieval_stress_workload_t: REPORT-ONLY (no assertion). Verdict = MET via real-corpus eu7 harness (343<405). Synthetic cannot meet the baseline-relative bound due to the synthetic data (524>168 @384d, 1048>282 @768d on a clean box).

hard_constraints_honored.honest_reporting: AC-013 latency does NOT meet 80/300 above the 10k tier; reported as-is (O(N) scan), not retconned. 1M not freshly measured locally (seed-drain timeout) — disclosed. AC-019 contention vs clean distinguished explicitly.
hard_constraints_honored.no_adr_lockflip_without_hitl: Tiered AC-013/AC-019 budget locked per explicit HITL 2026-06-01 decision; AC-012/AC-020 untouched.
hard_constraints_honored.canonical_ci_only_signal: OVERRIDDEN for this slice by explicit HITL decision (real-embedder canonical infeasible) -> local measurement is the verdict source; synthetic CI smoke is the regression guard. Documented, not silent.

next: codex review on the full diff (test wiring + workflow note + ADR + STATUS + data file); on PASS, flip STATUS PR-3 row to CLOSED and commit on local main (no push). Then PR-4 (release notes + push gate).
